sentence_reviews.text: Models update over a stream while balancing plasticity, stability, and catastrophic forgetting.

sentence_reviews.notes: The sentence is standard for continual/online learning, but the provided source pointer does not directly support streaming updates, plasticity-stability, or catastrophic forgetting in inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Continual & online learning is to connect Sequences, events & time series, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data to downstream capabilities including Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines, Procedural memory & skills.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Sequences, events & time series, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.

sentence_reviews.notes: Sequence/data dependencies are plausible for online learning, but multimodal/simulated data and the generic limitation are not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual & online learning uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.notes: Online/continual updates over streams imply temporal ordering; exact atlas label is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual & online learning uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.text: Continual & online learning uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.notes: Updating models online generally uses optimization, but the exact continual-learning dependency wording is synthesized.

edge_reviews.notes: Online/continual learning over streams has inherent temporal structure; uses/core is defensible.
Streaming data is relevant, but multimodal and simulated data are not generally required. Common strength is only partially supported.
Model updates usually rely on optimization; uses/common is defensible.
